recommendations.title: Nine Months
recommendations.overview: When he finds out his longtime girlfriend is pregnant, a commitment-phobe realizes he might have to change his lifestyle for better or much, much worse.

recommendations.title: Home Alone
recommendations.overview: Eight-year-old Kevin McCallister makes the most of the situation after his family unwittingly leaves him behind when they go on Christmas vacation. When thieves try to break into his home, he puts up a fight like no other.

recommendations.title: I Love You, Beth Cooper
recommendations.overview: A valedictorian's declaration of love for a high-school cheerleader launches a night of revelry, reflection and romance for a group of graduating seniors.

recommendations.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
recommendations.overview: Harry Potter has lived under the stairs at his aunt and uncle's house his whole life. But on his 11th birthday, he learns he's a powerful wizard—with a place waiting for him at the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. As he learns to harness h

recommendations.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
recommendations.overview: Loving but irresponsible dad Daniel Hillard, estranged from his exasperated spouse, is crushed by a court order allowing only weekly visits with his kids. When Daniel learns his ex needs a housekeeper, he gets the job -- disguised as a British nanny.

recommendations.title: Only the Lonely
recommendations.overview: Danny Muldoon, a Chicago policeman, still lives with his overbearing mother Rose. He meets and falls in love with Theresa Luna, whose father owns the local funeral parlour. Naturally, his mother objects to the relationship, and Danny and Theresa must

recommendations.title: Rent
recommendations.overview: In New York City's gritty East Village, a group of bohemians strive for success and acceptance while enduring the obstacles of poverty, illness and the AIDS epidemic.

recommendations.title: The Thursday Murder Club
recommendations.overview: A group of senior sleuths passionate about solving cold cases get plunged into a real-life murder mystery in this comic crime caper.

recommendations.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
recommendations.overview: Cars fly, trees fight back, and a mysterious house-elf comes to warn Harry Potter at the start of his second year at Hogwarts. Adventure and danger await when bloody writing on a wall announces: The Chamber Of Secrets Has Been Opened. To save Hogwart

recommendations.title: Bicentennial Man
